name: Pickled Blackeyed Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. While the peas (either freshly cooked or canned) are draining, mix the dressing.
2. Toss the peas with the dressing and cover tightly.
3. Refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to develop.
4. Remove garlic before serving.
5. Serve with a slotted spoon, to mound on crackers or toast points as an appetizer.
